title: erigeron dissectus
intro: Erigeron dissectus, also known as Fleabane, is a plant species native to North America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Erigeron dissectus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Erigeron dissectus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
